text:
- Update to 0.42
- Pet portlint

To maintainer:

I propose to rename this port as databases/p5-MySQL-Diff to match its name as
well as our naming tradition of Perl modules.
Do you agree with that?

Port maintainer (andrew@scoop.co.nz) is cc'd.
